screen.soul_ascension.title: Character

attribute_description.soul_ascension.min: Damage dealt by melee attacks. The current value includes the held weapon and all active modifiers.
How quickly the player can perform full-strength attacks.
Damage reduction supplied by armor and other modifiers.
Reduces how strongly high damage bypasses armor.
The maximum block step the player can walk up without jumping.
Affects loot tables and other luck-aware mechanics.
message.soul_ascension.level_up: Level up! Your level is now %s.
message.soul_ascension.amnesia_used: Your stats were reset. Returned points: %s. Lost points: %s.
message.soul_ascension.amnesia_nothing: You have no allocated stat points, or stat reset is disabled.
integration.soul_ascension.provider_hint: Install or register a SOUL ASCENSION adapter to display race, class, and their descriptions.
integration.soul_ascension.no_synced_dat: The mod is installed but exposes no synchronized player attributes.
tooltip.soul_ascension.withered_memory_p: Few would willingly drink this. The stench is unbearable.
tooltip.soul_ascension.amnesia_scroll.lo: Using this scroll will permanently lose %s%% of allocated points.
tooltip.soul_ascension.debug.level_up: Adds enough damage XP to gain one level.
tooltip.soul_ascension.concealment_emble: Hides your public Soul Ascension profile while equipped or activated.
Can be worn as a charm when a supported accessory mod is installed.
tooltip.soul_ascension.requires_concealm: An Emblem of Concealment is required.
item.soul_ascension.concealment_emblem.t: Craft with Ender Eyes, amethyst and lapis around a Soul Badge.
message.soul_ascension.concealment.wear_: Wear this emblem in a charm slot.
message.soul_ascension.soul_altar.disabl: The Soul Altar is disabled or too far away.
message.soul_ascension.soul_altar.cannot: You cannot pay the configured respec cost.
message.soul_ascension.soul_altar.respec: Your allocated stat points were returned.
screen.soul_ascension.public_profile.hid: This player has hidden their profile.

screen.soul_ascension.soul_altar.respec_: Reset allocated attribute points without losing your level.
screen.soul_ascension.soul_altar.privacy: Hidden profiles cannot be inspected by Soul Lens.
screen.soul_ascension.soul_altar.conceal: Your equipped Emblem is currently concealing the profile.

item.soul_ascension.soul_lens.tooltip.2: Scroll to browse attributes without changing the hotbar slot.
